name: responsay
title: Responsay
description: Turn English text or Chinese intent into spoken-English practice with prosody, model audio, and shadowing.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: analyze-selection
commands.title: Analyze Selected English
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Analyze selected English text for stress, intonation, rhythm, linking, and model pronunciation.

commands.name: practice-sentence
commands.title: Practice English
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Type or paste English and turn it into a pronunciation lesson.

commands.name: translate-selection
commands.title: Say Selection in English
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Turn selected Chinese intent or rough wording into natural English you can practice aloud.

commands.name: translate-clipboard
commands.title: Say Clipboard in English
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Turn clipboard text into natural English you can practice aloud.

commands.name: translate-intent
commands.title: Say What I Mean
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Type what you mean in Chinese and get natural English wording ready for pronunciation practice.

commands.name: saved-results
commands.title: Saved Results
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Review expressions and pronunciation analyses saved from Responsay.

commands.name: pinned-expressions
commands.title: Pinned Expressions
commands.subtitle: Responsay
commands.description: Keep your saved expressions one click away in the menu bar.

preferences.name: defaultAnalysisProvider
preferences.title: Defaults: Coach Provider
preferences.description: Initial provider for pronunciation analysis and natural-English expression. You can change provider and model per run from the Action Panel.

preferences.name: ttsProvider
preferences.title: Defaults: Voice Provider
preferences.description: Initial provider for model audio. Follow Coach Provider uses the coach provider when its voice key is set, otherwise the first configured voice provider.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisApiKey
preferences.title: Qwen Coach: Token Plan API Key
preferences.description: Used only for Qwen coaching, expression, and pronunciation analysis. Qwen Voice uses the separate Qwen DashScope key below.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Qwen Coach: Model
preferences.description: Qwen text model used for pronunciation analysis and natural-English expression.

preferences.name: qwenApiKey
preferences.title: Qwen DashScope API Key (Voice)
preferences.description: Used only for Qwen voice playback. Qwen Coach uses the Token Plan key above.

preferences.name: qwenRegion
preferences.title: Qwen DashScope Region (Voice)
preferences.description: Qwen DashScope region for Qwen voice playback.

preferences.name: qwenTtsModel
preferences.title: Qwen Voice: Model
preferences.description: Qwen TTS model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: qwenTtsVoice
preferences.title: Qwen Voice: Voice
preferences.description: Voice for Qwen TTS (all support English).

preferences.name: mimoApiKey
preferences.title: MiMo: Token Plan API Key
preferences.description: Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan key (tp-...). Used for both MiMo Coach and MiMo Voice.

preferences.name: mimoAnalysisModel
preferences.title: MiMo Coach: Model
preferences.description: MiMo text model used for pronunciation analysis and natural-English expression.

preferences.name: mimoTtsVoice
preferences.title: MiMo Voice: Voice
preferences.description: Voice for MiMo TTS (English voices).

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini: API Key
preferences.description: Google AI Studio key for both Gemini Coach and Gemini Voice.

preferences.name: geminiAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Gemini Coach: Model
preferences.description: Gemini text model used for pronunciation analysis and natural-English expression.

preferences.name: geminiTtsVoice
preferences.title: Gemini Voice: Voice
preferences.description: Voice for Gemini TTS.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI: API Key
preferences.description: Used for both OpenAI Coach and OpenAI Voice.

preferences.name: openaiTtsVoice
preferences.title: OpenAI Voice: Voice
preferences.description: Voice for OpenAI TTS.

preferences.name: translationTargetLanguage
preferences.title: Practice: Translation Target
preferences.description: Target language for Translate Sentence/Page inside the practice view. Standalone Say ... in English commands always target English.

preferences.name: sentencesPerPage
preferences.title: Practice: Sentences Per Page
preferences.description: How many sentences are shown and analyzed together for long passages.

preferences.name: loopCount
preferences.title: Practice: Shadowing Loop Count
preferences.description: How many times the Shadowing Loop repeats the sentence.

preferences.name: loopGap
preferences.title: Practice: Shadowing Loop Gap
preferences.description: Pause between repeats in the Shadowing Loop.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisBaseURL
preferences.title: Advanced: Qwen Coach Base URL
preferences.description: Token Plan base URL for Qwen coaching. The default is Anthropic-compatible; OpenAI-compatible /compatible-mode/v1 is also supported.

preferences.name: mimoBaseURL
preferences.title: Advanced: MiMo Coach Base URL
preferences.description: Anthropic-compatible base URL for MiMo coaching. MiMo Voice uses the matching Token Plan /v1 endpoint because the Anthropic messages endpoint does not return audio.
